description_long: This is a long, classic-style limousine with a deep blue body and silver trim, featuring a prominent, angular front grille and chrome accents along the sides. The vehicle has a boxy, elongated profile with a flat roof and extended rear section, suggesting ample interior space for passengers. The windows are tinted and rectangular, with three visible per side, separated by silver pillars. The wheels are partially covered by fender skirts, and the rear end is characterized by pronounced tail fins and a central circular detail. The front end displays a V-shaped emblem and a wide, horizontal grille, while the rear features small, red tail lights integrated into the fins. The overall design evokes mid-20th-century American luxury cars, emphasizing both elegance and spaciousness.
description: A classic, elongated blue limousine with silver trim, boxy shape, and pronounced tail fins, featuring three side windows per side and chrome accents.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wide, angular grille, V-shaped emblem, and the flat hood with silver trim.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the limousine's length, three side windows, chrome trim, and covered rear wheel.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the pronounced tail fins, central circular detail, and small red tail lights.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the same window and trim configuration, and the extended rear section.
